channel.title: Blog on James Wade
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on James Wade

item.title: A Beginning - Exploring Learning Tools to Teach R Packages
item.description: I have an idea for lowering the barrier to learn new R packages. I have built a few private packages, but nothing of mine fits the bill for what I want to try. There are uncountable resources for getting started with R, and I do not have much to add there. If you defied the odds and found this before you found STAT 545, I highly recommend that course. My idea is to integrate three fantastic tools for thought:
